creator: venture37@geeklan.co.uk
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
I was just clarifying in what scenario/component the issue is.

While the version in ports may not be vulnerable, a vuxml entry is needed to indicate to users of previous versions that there is an issue & they need to upgrade. Otherwise, the issue may go undetected unless the user actively monitors the project and realises there is either an update in ports or realises from upstream or another source.
